name: Journey To The Wand
short_description: Elowen and her lazy pet, Marshy, embark on a quest to retrieve her wand, providing players with a unique adventure. The compelling story of the game will captivate players from beginning to end.
detailed_description:
Journey To The Wand is a challenging platform game with stylized graphics.

Story:

In a village, there lived a wizard named Elowen. Elowen would gaze at the clouds from her window while sleeping at night, dreaming of casting a spell to fly into the clouds with her wand when he woke up in the morning. He performed the spell, took her wand, and just as he was about to soar into the clouds, her magic failed. Elowen remained on Earth, and her wand flew towards the clouds along with some earthly objects. Elowen and her pet, Marshy, set out on a journey to retrieve her wand using their human abilities, but Marshy was very lazy.

Main Features of the Game:

Challenging Platforms: Players will navigate Elowen through various challenging platforms, requiring jumps, runs, and climbs.

Graphics and Atmosphere: The game captivates the player with high-quality anime-style graphics and atmosphere.

Various Traps: The game consists of levels not only with straightforward objects but also with physical features and objects with various movements, creating diverse and dynamic challenges.
